new_classes.label_en: Purification process (elimination of fermented-beverage characteristics, heading 2208)
new_classes.label_de: Reinigungsverfahren (Beseitigung der Merkmale gegorener Getränke, Position 2208)
new_classes.definition_en: A process applied after fermentation that purifies the product to such a degree that it loses the properties and characteristics of fermented beverages and acquires those of ethyl alcohol of less than 80% vol, as described in the legal notes for subheadings 2208 90 91 and 2208 90 99.

new_classes.label_en: Fermented-characteristics-lost quality (product has undergone purification such that fermented-beverage properties are eliminated)
new_classes.label_de: Qualität des Verlusts gegorener Merkmale (Erzeugnis hat ein Reinigungsverfahren durchlaufen, sodass die Eigenschaften eines gegorenen Getränks verlorengegangen sind)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a product that has undergone a purification process after fermentation, resulting in the loss of the organoleptic properties and characteristics typical of fermented beverages, in accordance with the legal notes for subheadings 2208 90 91 and 2208 90 99.

new_classes.label_en: Undenatured ethyl alcohol of an alcoholic strength < 80% vol, obtained not exclusively through fermentation but also through purification, in containers > 2 L (subheading 2208 90 99)
new_classes.label_de: Ethylalkohol mit einem Alkoholgehalt von weniger als 80 % vol, unvergällt, nicht ausschließlich durch Gärung, sondern auch durch Reinigungsverfahren gewonnen, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 L (Unterposition 2208 90 99)
new_classes.definition_en: Undenatured ethyl alcohol of an alcoholic strength by volume of less than 80%, produced not exclusively through fermentation but also through a purification process that causes the product to lose the properties of fermented beverages, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres. Corresponds to CN subheading 2208 90 99.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main distinguishing criteria for 2208 90 99: (1) undenatured ethyl alcohol with ABV < 80% vol (modelled via UndenaturedQuality restriction and the decimalRange on alcoholByVolumePercent); (2) the product is obtained not exclusively through fermentation but also through a purification process that causes it to lose fermented-beverage characteristics (modelled via the new FermentedCharacteristicsLostQuality quality class and the PurificationProcess2208 process class, linked via producedBy and has_quality restrictions); and (3) presentation in containers holding more than 2 litres (via the LargeContainer restriction using the existing TBox SmallContainer/LargeContainer pattern). Coverage is slightly below 1.0 because: (a) the legal note text is truncated ("acquiring tho..." / "verlieren und ") so the full consequence of purification — that the product acquires the characteristics of ethyl alcohol — cannot be fully axiomatised without risking over-commitment; (b) the precise threshold distinguishing 2208 90 91 (≤ 2 L) from 2208 90 99 (> 2 L) relies on the LargeContainer equivalence class in the TBox which uses ≥ 2 L (minInclusive 2.0), not strictly > 2 L; this is a pre-existing TBox approximation. The sibling code 2208 90 91 (small container ≤ 2 L variant of the same product type) is not modelled here as it is a different CN code.
